caption: The video captures a political event featuring Narendra Modi, who is wearing a white kurta with an orange and green scarf draped around his neck. He is seen speaking and gesturing with his hands while standing before a backdrop filled with the lotus logo of the Bharatiya Janata Party. To his side, several other men are seated, dressed in traditional Indian attire including kurtas and orange caps. The screen is framed by a heavy orange border containing the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" and "लाइव देखें" alongside social media handles like "@BJP4India" and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Small labels "प्रज्ञानमंत्री" and "दिल्ली" appear in the corners of the graphic overlay. Across the frames, the camera switches between a medium shot of Modi speaking and a wide shot of the seated dignitaries, while the graphic overlays remain constant throughout the sequence.
